extraction.one_line_summary: HOULE Hugo won from breakaway after surviving category 1 climbs, beating JORGENSEN and WOODS in technical finishing circuit with 180-degree turn before uphill finish.
tactical_patterns: GESCHKE Simon riding defensively for KOM points despite being marked, prioritizing survival over aggressive collection on Cat-4 climbs.
Final 300m featured 180-degree turn before uphill finish; JORGENSEN led into corner but HOULE's late positioning won it.
POGACAR attacked first Cat-1 climb catching VINGEGAARD unprepared, then closed gap at extreme speed on 7-8% gradients showing superior form.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: attacked Category 1 climb catching Vingegaard off-guard, then bridged gaps on 7-8% gradients at speeds that surprised commentators
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: caught unprepared by Pogacar's first Cat-1 attack, needed to chase back rather than controlling tempo
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: dropped from 4th to 9th overall, significant GC collapse on stage with no reported mechanical issues
rider_signals.HOULE Hugo: positive: first road race ever was Tour de France, won stage in debut showing exceptional racing instincts
rider_signals.JORGENSEN Matteo: neutral: strong enough to lead final corner but lacked punch on short uphill finish sprint
